name: rei-crack
prompt: Extreme close-up on eyes. Ice-blue eyes widening, gaze dropping briefly downward then back up — caught looking at his lips. Composure cracking. Breath catching visible. Moisture gathering. Flush visible at edges of frame on cheeks. The mask fracturing. Dark radiating lines — impact moment. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: kade-there
prompt: Medium close-up. Dark-haired young man in dim storage room, close now — heat winning, frost retreating. Amber eyes soft, seeing her. Expression tender beneath the heat. Concrete walls and metal shelving behind him. Warm amber dominant. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

dialogue.speaker: Kade
dialogue.text: There. That's what you look like when you stop pretending.
